articles.title: U.S.-Iran strikes rattle global markets, send bitcoin to 6-week low
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for May 28, 2026

articles.title: Samsung units to buy $408 million stake in South Korea’s biggest crypto exchange
articles.description: Samsung Securities is set to take a 2% stake in Dunamu, worth over $200 million, from affiliates of technology conglomerate Kakao.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s famous CME gaps are about to disappear, though three remain unresolved
articles.description: The launch of round-the-clock bitcoin futures trading eliminates the long-standing CME weekend gap and marks another step toward fully integrated institutional crypto markets.

articles.title: Crypto slides on Hormuz airstrikes as $897 million in long liquidations pile up
articles.description: BTC dropped to its lowest since April 13 and ETH broke below $2,000 as U.S. airstrikes stoked inflation concerns, wiping out nearly $900 million in leveraged longs.

articles.title: Bitcoin Slips Under $73K as Crypto Liquidations Near $1B
articles.description: The near-$1 billion crypto liquidation spree comes amid rising tensions over the U.S.-Iran conflict and ETF outflows.

articles.title: Polymarket exec says KYC limited to beta product, not existing platform
articles.description: Polymarket executive Josh Stevens said identity checks apply only to early beta access and are not being added to Polymarket’s existing platform.

articles.title: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
articles.description: The Bank for International Settlements' collaboration with seven central banks and more than 40 institutions concludes a two-year project with a prototype settling wholesale payments in seconds.

articles.title: CFTC, Gemini File Joint Motion to Reverse $5M Settlement
articles.description: The regulator filed alongside the crypto exchange to undo a 2025 consent order it now says "should not have been filed."

articles.title: Crypto liquidations hit $935M as Bitcoin price dips to $72.6K

articles.title: White House reviews CFTC prediction-market rule as Trump backs federal control
articles.description: The proposal could shape how Kalshi, Polymarket, and other event-contract platforms operate as states challenge the CFTC’s authority.

articles.title: Diverging trends: Ether slides below $2,000 while futures open interest hits record high of 16 million ETH
articles.description: Ether drops below $2,000 amid heavy selling pressure, yet futures open interest hits a record high. This divergences suggests aggressive shorting.

articles.title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
articles.description: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.

articles.title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
articles.description: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.

articles.title: CFTC seeks to reverse settlement deal with Gemini
articles.description: The CFTC claimed that its settled complaint filed under the Biden administration relied heavily on a whistleblower’s allegations that Gemini inflated trading activity to distort user demand.

articles.title: BlackRock's bitcoin ETF sheds $528 million, the second-largest daily outflow on record
